title: veridict named-competitor match record
description: One JSONL line of input to `veridict matrix --matches`: a head-to-head match between two named competitors. Unlike input-record.schema.json, there is no sparse/status-only variant - a/b/result are required, not optional. Use the literal name "baseline" in a/b to connect this data to the baseline node implied by legacy per-file input.

id.description: Used by --paired-by-id to net two records sharing an id into one observation.
